summary: A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000002) was filed for Sally Dominguez's account (NP00000000000983174071) at ADBL, which showed a cash withdrawal transfer of NPR 21,807.13 to Henry King's account (NP00000000000894070684) at HBL on 2022-10-07. The report was submitted for further analysis due to these unusual patterns, with the customer having been with the institution for some years. The transaction details and customer information have been provided for review, with all relevant information included in this report.
narrative: During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at ADBL examined the account held by Sally Dominguez after an internal threshold alert was triggered.
